title: The Rise of AI Pair Programming: How Coding Tools Are Evolving
author: Jane Smith
snippet: AI coding assistants are becoming sophisticated enough to serve as genuine pair programmers, understanding context and suggesting architectural changes.
why_relevant: In-depth analysis of AI coding tool capabilities

title: Enterprise AI Coding Adoption Hits 60% Among Fortune 500
author: John Doe
snippet: A new survey shows 60% of Fortune 500 companies have deployed AI coding tools, up from 35% a year ago.
